instruction: Open Reminders and add a new reminder with the title {TITLE} to the default list.
source: adapted:cua-bench:apps/reminders.py mode=intent; trycua cua-bench models Apple Reminders with AppleScript getters (get_all_reminders) as the native-macOS analogue of foreign 'create a task/reminder' tasks (AndroidWorld task-management); the INTENT is re-expressed against Apple Reminders and the created item is read back via the Tier-C AppleScript one-shot

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Reminders" to delete (every reminder whose name is "{TITLE}")' 2>/dev/null || true
osascript -e 'tell application "Reminders" to make new reminder with properties {name:"{TITLE}"}' 2>/dev/null || true

result.script: tell application "Reminders" to return (count of (every reminder whose name is "{TITLE}") > 0)
